series_metadata.series_title: Ohio Retail Cigarette Floor Stock Tax Return
series_metadata.series_description: This form is used by retailers to report their inventory of cigarettes on hand and pay excise tax on this inventory based upon legislative changes which increase the cigarette excise tax.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Forms will be destroyed end of calendar year in which return was filed. If scanned, . ; Electronic: Forms will be deleted end of calendar year in which return was filed
